ComponentsProperties.Name: model-value
ComponentsProperties.Description: 选中项绑定值

ComponentsProperties.Description: 设置计数器允许的最小值

ComponentsProperties.Description: 设置计数器允许的最大值

ComponentsProperties.Name: step
ComponentsProperties.Description: 计数器步长

ComponentsProperties.Name: step-strictly
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否只能输入 step 的倍数

ComponentsProperties.Name: precision
ComponentsProperties.Description: 数值精度

ComponentsProperties.Name: size
ComponentsProperties.Description: 计数器尺寸

ComponentsProperties.Name: readonly
ComponentsProperties.Description: 原生 readonly 属性，是否只读

ComponentsProperties.Name: disabled
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否禁用状态

ComponentsProperties.Name: controls
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否使用控制按钮

ComponentsProperties.Name: controls-position
ComponentsProperties.Description: 控制按钮位置

ComponentsProperties.Name: name
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input name 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: aria-labela11y
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input aria-label 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: placeholder
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input placeholder 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: id
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input id 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: value-on-clear
ComponentsProperties.Description: 当输入框被清空时显示的值

ComponentsProperties.Name: validate-event
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否触发表单验证

ComponentsProperties.Name: labela11y
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input aria-label 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: inputmode
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input inputmode 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: align
ComponentsProperties.Description: 内部输入文本对齐

ComponentsProperties.Name: disabled-scientific
ComponentsProperties.Description: 禁用科学计数法的输入（例如输入 'e'）

ComponentSlots.Name: decrease-icon
ComponentSlots.Description: 自定义输入框按钮减少图标

ComponentSlots.Name: increase-icon
ComponentSlots.Description: 自定义输入框按钮增加图标

ComponentEvents.Name: change
ComponentEvents.TypeDescription: (currentValue: number | undefined, oldValue: number | undefined) => void

ComponentEvents.Name: blur
ComponentEvents.Description: 在组件 Input 失去焦点时触发

ComponentEvents.Name: focus
ComponentEvents.Description: 在组件 Input 获得焦点时触发
